prompt.role: You're an expert in content consolidation and knowledge summarization. Your task is to read a collection of memory records and produce a concise, useful knowledge summary plus a set of reusable skill cards.

formatting.rules: Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown code blocks or explanatory text. Follow the exact JSON schema specified below. The summary MUST be plain Markdown, Obsidian-compatible. Skill instructions must be concrete and actionable.

prompt.instructions:
Read the memory records below and produce: 1. A Markdown summary (2-8 paragraphs) grouped by area/topic. Preserve important facts, decisions, and patterns. Use [[wiki-links]] for related topics/people when relevant. 2. A list of reusable skill cards. Each skill should capture one concrete know-how item an agent can reuse later.
RULES: - Do not invent facts that are not in the records. - Merge duplicate or near-duplicate records into a single skill. - Skip trivial or low-value records. - Keep the original language of the records. - Avoid generic advice; derive each skill from actual records.

example.name: merge_notes
example.human:
Memory records: 1. [note] Dart tips Use try/catch or Result wrappers to handle async errors.
2. [note] Flutter state Prefer Riverpod for global state management.

prompt.output_requirements: Output MUST be valid JSON that can be parsed without errors. Do NOT include markdown code blocks (```json) or explanatory text. Return the raw JSON object directly.
